channel.title: homelab on WhyNot.Fail
channel.description: Recent content in homelab on WhyNot.Fail

item.title: Let's Encrypt the house!
item.description: (NOTE: This whole setup described is useless. Cloudflare offers this whole service for free with a much easier setup and 0 maintenance. Reported by an HN comment (my handle on HN is ttouch). Don’t use what I describe bellow unless you really have a reason not to use Cloudflare. That’s what this blog is about. Failures :) ) That’s what my mother always said when I was little. And don’t talk to strangers.
